Should an eclipse, solar or lunar, occur in the lunar month of
Karttika, men who eke out their livelihood through fire, people of
JMagadha, eastern kings, people of the Kosala country, the Kalma-

sas, the ^urasenas and those of Kasi (Benares) will be put to great

If an eclipse takes place in the month of Marga^irsa, it will
destroy the people of Kashmir, Kosala, and Pundra as well as
the animals of the forests and the people of the western border. It
will also harm the Soma sacrificcrs, but it will lead to good rains
and to the happiness and prosperity of the people,
